scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler deploy -c dist/sons_of_disparity/wrangler.json
scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute sons-of-disparity-db --local --file=./src/db/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute sons-of-disparity-db --local --file=./src/db/seed.sql
scripts.db:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 execute sons-of-disparity-db --remote --file=./src/db/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute sons-of-disparity-db --remote --file=./src/db/seed.sql
